Good mac type apple, possibly seedling that drops a ton of fruit in the early fall. Best just before it fully ripens when it has some tartness to it. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Apple tree, mostly in the shade. Pretty yellow transparent colored apples that get a pink red blush. Not sure on quality, gets fairly eaten up and fruit is higher in the air. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.
